description: Call GET /api/v1/google/jobs/search for Google SERP Jobs Search through Just Serp API with query.

operations.description: Get Google jobs Search data, including titles, companies, and locations, for aggregating job board results, analyzing hiring trends, and monitoring recruitment activity.

parameters.description: The job search query (e.g., 'software engineer', 'data scientist London').
parameters.name: query

parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.
parameters.name: country

parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.
parameters.name: language

parameters.description: Token for retrieving the next page of job results. Found in 'next_page_token' of a previous response.
parameters.name: next_page_token

parameters.description: Additional search filters (chips) such as job type, date posted, etc. Use values returned in previous responses.
parameters.name: chips

parameters.description: Search radius in miles around the specified location.
parameters.name: lrad

parameters.description: Filter by job location type. Set to '1' for work-from-home (remote) jobs.
parameters.name: ltype

parameters.description: Advanced Google-provided filter string for job results.
parameters.name: uds

parameters.description: Encoded location string (UULE) to localize job results to a specific geographic area.
parameters.name: uule

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
